context: Tests whether the agent uses the current AudioAccessoryKit registration API and preserves container-app versus app-extension ownership.

checklist.name: Paired accessory prerequisite
checklist.description: States that AudioAccessoryKit starts after AccessorySetupKit pairing yields an ASAccessory.

checklist.name: Configuration registration
checklist.description: Registers with AccessoryControlDevice.Configuration rather than passing a raw Capabilities value.

checklist.name: Container app registration
checklist.description: Places register(_: _:) in the container app after pairing.

checklist.name: Switching capabilities
checklist.description: Includes audioSwitching and placement capabilities for placement-aware automatic switching hardware.

checklist.name: Initial placement
checklist.description: Uses or explains an initial placement value such as offHead when registering placement-aware hardware.

checklist.name: Extension updates
checklist.description: Places current(for:) and update(_:) in the app extension update path.

checklist.name: Preserve configuration
checklist.description: Updates placement by reading the current configuration and modifying the relevant field rather than rebuilding unrelated state blindly.

checklist.name: Error handling
checklist.description: Handles or explicitly calls out AccessoryControlDevice.Error cases or failed registration/update operations.

checklist.name: No direct ASAccessory construction
checklist.description: Does not construct ASAccessory manually and treats it as system-provided by AccessorySetupKit.

checklist.name: No broad framework overreach
checklist.description: Does not present AudioAccessoryKit as the Bluetooth discovery, picker, or firmware communication framework.
